title: Secure, Performant, and Maintainable Python Delivery · Retrieval Circuit
summary: Deliver a trustworthy local automation product for a community program with operator and learner documentation. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a production-shaped local automation capstone after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Turn stakeholder stories into explicit inputs, outputs, invariants, failures, acceptance checks, and staged implementation work.
Treat files, arguments, environment values, paths, and subprocess data as untrusted boundaries with least authority.
Keep secrets out of source and logs while validating configuration presence, provenance, and safe defaults.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""python-basics cumulative stakeholder program."""

from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Python Capstone Evidence applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Defend architecture, correctness, accessibility of terminal output, security, failure recovery, and future extensions with evidence.
